overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character moving from a sheltered indoor doorway into a heavy downpour on a neon-lit city street at night. The scene features wet pavement reflecting colorful neon signs, graffiti-covered walls, and a dystopian urban atmosphere with continuous heavy rainfall.

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a sheltered indoor area near a doorway, with illuminated movie posters on the left wall and a vending machine on the right. Heavy rain is visible falling outside through the open doorway, creating a stark contrast between the dry interior and the wet exterior environment.

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building into the heavy rain, transitioning from the sheltered interior to the open street. Neon signs become visible in the distance as the character steps onto the wet pavement, with the vending machine now positioned further back to the right.

The heavy rain creates an immersive atmosphere as the character approaches a graffiti-covered wall with a pile of debris emitting an eerie blue glow.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wall featuring prominent graffiti and a pile of debris emitting an eerie blue glow. The camera tilts upward to reveal a tall building facade illuminated by a security light, with rain streaming down the metal surface, before panning back down to the street level with neon reflections shimmering in the puddles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dry, sheltered interior into a rain-drenched cyberpunk street illuminated by neon lights. It begins inside a doorway flanked by illuminated movie posters and a vending machine, looking out at a heavy downpour. As the camera steps forward, the scene transitions from the sheltered interior to the open street, where the dry floor gives way to wet pavement reflecting distant neon signs. The movement continues along the rain-soaked road toward a graffiti-covered wall and a pile of debris emitting an eerie blue glow. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal a tall building facade streaming with rain under a security light before panning back down to the shimmering puddles of the city street.
